title: Ventura County SFR — Type V-B, 3 stories non-sprinklered (exceeds Table 504.4)
notes: Mirror of LA fixture — same physics, different jurisdiction. Tests stories_check + sprinkler negation in Ventura context.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 318 SESPE CREEK WAY, VENTURA COUNTY (FILLMORE area)
CODE ANALYSIS A-0.1
2022 CBC + Ventura County Div. VIII
Occupancy Group: R-3
Construction Type: V-B
Number of stories: 3
Building height: 32 ft
Total building area: 3,000 sf
Per-story area: 1,000 sf
Non-sprinklered
Design occupant load: 10
IECC: Title 24 Part 6
Electrical service: 200 A main breaker
WC 3, LAV 3
EXIT 1 (front), EXIT 2 (rear)
NFPA 72 smoke alarms

ground_truth.rationale: 3 stories exceeds non-sprinklered allowable for R-3/V-B
Non-sprinklered for a configuration requiring NFPA 13/13R
